frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 CSS-first (@theme, OKLCH), shadcn base-nova on @base-ui/react
frontend.i18n: next-intl 4.13, cookie-based locale (NEXT_LOCALE), locales [en, de], no URL prefix
frontend.data: TanStack Query v5 + typed axios (src/lib/axios/strapi.ts) — NOT used by this mission (static landing)

backend.path: schooltest-api (Strapi v5) — OUT OF SCOPE, not touched, not needed
backend.datastore: none for this mission — landing content lives in src/i18n/messages/{en,de}.json

neighbors_to_avoid.schooltest-app: separate product app — do not touch

run_path.e2e: pnpm exec playwright test — playwright.config.ts webServer boots `next dev -p 3100` on demand; no persistent servers, no docker

baseline.lint: 0 errors, 1 pre-existing warning (articles module, out of scope)
